input.content:
# Jeff Phone — UI/UX Redesign Plan

**App**: Jeff Phone (React Native / Expo, on-device Gemma AI chat)
**Goal**: Transform from dark developer-tool aesthetic to a bright, modern, polished consumer app
**Screens**: Chat (index.tsx), Settings (settings.tsx), Memories (memories.tsx)

---

## 1. Design Direction

**From**: Ultra-dark (#080a0f), flat, text-heavy, developer-facing, no animations
**To**: Warm cream-white base, vibrant teal + coral accents, emoji-driven actions, animated and alive

The redesign leans into a **warm, friendly AI companion** feel — think premium consumer chat app, not a debug console. Every surface should feel intentional, every interaction should have tactile feedback, and the overall tone should say "your personal brain" not "a model inference dashboard."

---

## 2. Colour System

### Backgrounds

| Role | Old | New | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Root | `#080a0f` | `#FAF7F5` | Warm cream-white, easy on the eyes |
| Card / Panel | `#10141d` | `#FFFFFF` | Pure white elevated surfaces |
| Glass fallback | `#10141d` | `#F3EFEC` | Slightly warmer for layered areas |
| Secondary surface | `#171b25` | `#EDE8E4` | Settings section groups |
| Divider | `#1c2230` | `#E2DCD7` | Subtle warm grey separator |

### Text

| Role | Old | New |
|---|---|---|
| Primary | `#f4f7fb` | `#1A1A1A` |
| Secondary | `#9aa3b5` | `#5C5650` |
| Muted / placeholder | `#737987` | `#9B9490` |
| On-accent (dark bg) | `#07110f` | `#FFFFFF` |
| On-accent (light bg) | N/A | `#0E4F47` |

### Accents

| Role | Hex | Use |
|---|---|---|
| Primary (teal) | `#12B89E` | Send button, links, active states, toggles |
| Primary pressed | `#0E9C86` | Press/hover state |
| Secondary (coral) | `#F2785C` | Voice active, highlights, warmth |
| Success | `#2ECC87` | Model ready, completion states |
| Warning | `#F0A93A` | Downloading, processing states |
| Error | `#E8544E` | Errors, destructive hints |

### Message Bubbles

| Role | Background | Text | Border |
|---|---|---|---|
| User | `#12B89E` | `#FFFFFF` | none |
| Assistant | `#F3EFEC` | `#1A1A1A` | `#E2DCD7` |
| Tool | `#FFF4E6` | `#5C5650` | `#F0D9B5` |
| System | `#EDE8E4` | `#9B9490` | none |

### Buttons

| State | Background | Text | Border |
|---|---|---|---|
| Primary | `#12B89E` | `#FFFFFF` | none |
| Primary pressed | `#0E9C86` | `#FFFFFF` | none |
| Secondary | `#F3EFEC` | `#12B89E` | `#D4CEC9` |
| Ghost | `rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` | `#5C5650` | none |
| Disabled | `#EDE8E4` | `#9B9490` | none |
| Destructive | `#FDEEED` | `#E8544E` | none |
| Selected option | `#E6F9F5` | `#0E4F47` | `#12B89E` |

### Gradients

- **Voice panel**: `linear-gradient(135deg, #E6F9F5 0%, #FFF0EB 100%)` — teal-tint to coral-tint
- **Primary button shimmer** (optional): `linear-gradient(90deg, #12B89E 0%, #0ECDB3 100%)`

### StatusBar

Change from `style="light"` to `style="dark"` in `_layout.tsx`. Update `contentStyle` background to `#FAF7F5`.

---

## 3. Emoji Button Mapping

### Chat Screen — Emoji-Only Compact Buttons (18-20pt)

| Current | Emoji | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **New** | `✨` | Header pill, accessibilityLabel="New chat" |
| **Brain** | `🧠` | Header pill, semantically perfect |
| **Settings** | `⚙️` | Header pill, universal |
| **Photo** | `🖼️` | Composer button (alt: `📷`) |
| **File** | `📎` | Composer button |
| **Mic** | `🎙️` | Idle state |
| **End** (voice) | `⏹️` | Listening state (tinted via voiceActiveButton style) |
| **Stop** (voice) | `⏹️` | Speaking state |
| **Cancel** (voice) | `✖️` | Connecting/requesting state |
| **Send** | `⬆️` | 20pt in primary teal circle (iOS Messages convention) |
| **Stop** (generation) | `⏹️` | 20pt in coral cancel button |
| **Play** (speech) | `🔊` | 14pt mini bubble button |
| **Stop** (speech) | `⏹️` | 14pt when active |
| **Show/Hide** (thinking) | `▶` / `▼` | 12pt disclosure chevrons |
| **Clear** (attachments) | `🗑️` | 14pt tray header |
| **X** (remove) | `✕` | Keep as-is (already single glyph in 24x24 badge) |

### Settings & Memories — Emoji + Label (14pt prefix)

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| **Done** | `✓ Done` |
| **Load model** | `📦 Load model` |
| **Reload model** | `🔄 Reload` |
| **Retry model** | `🔄 Retry` |
| **Working...** | `⏳ Working...` |
| **Unload** | `📤 Unload` |
| **Manage memories** | `🧠 Manage` |
| **Refresh** | `🔄 Refresh` |
| **New chat** | `✨ New chat` |
| **Manual** | `🔧 Manual` |
| **Smart** | `🤖 Smart` |
| **Delete** | `🗑️ Delete` |
| **Show/Hide details** | `▶ Show details` / `▼ Hide details` |

### Non-Button Emoji Additions

| Location | Addition |
|---|---|
| Empty state (chat) | `💬 Jeff is ready for a chat.` |
| Empty state (memories) | `🧠 No memories yet` |
| Voice tray labels | `👂 Listening`, `🔊 Speaking`, `✍️ Transcribing` |
| Generation status | `⚡ Now streaming`, `🤔 Thinking`, `🔧 Using tools` |
| Error text | Prefix all with `⚠️` |
| Section headers (settings) | `📦 Local Model`, `🧠 Memory`, `🔀 Provider Mode`, `💬 Conversation`, `🔍 Runtime Diagnostics` |
| Tool call pills | `✅ done`, `⏳ running`, `❌ failed` prefixes |
| Staged file preview | `📄` emoji centred in thumbnail |

---

## 4. Typography System

### Type Scale

| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Display | 34 | 700 | 40 | -0.5 | Screen titles ("Jeff") |
| Heading | 22 | 700 | 28 | -0.3 | Page titles ("Settings", "Memories") |
| Subheading | 17 | 600 | 22 | -0.2 | Section titles, card names |
| Body | 15 | 400 | 22 | 0 | Message text, descriptions |
| Body Bold | 15 | 600 | 22 | 0 | Option labels, status values |
| Caption | 13 | 500 | 18 | 0 | Detail text, subtitles |
| Eyebrow | 11 | 700 | 14 | 0.8 | Uppercase labels |
| Micro | 10 | 600 | 13 | 0.5 | Timestamps, badge text |

**Font**: System font (San Francisco). Native feel, zero bundle cost. Brand personality comes from colour and layout.

**Key change**: Drop 800/900 font weights entirely. Currently everything screams at the same volume. Use 400 for conversational text, 600 for interactive labels, 700 for titles only.

### Spacing Scale

Base unit: **4px**. Use multiples: 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 48.

| Context | Old | New |
|---|---|---|
| Screen horizontal padding | 18px | 20px (5x) |
| Gap between list items | 12px | 12px (3x) |
| Section vertical padding | varies | 24px (6x) |
| Button height | 40px | 44px (Apple HIG minimum) |

---

## 5. Component Design Language

### Border Radius Scale

| Token | Value | Use |
|---|---|---|
| xs | 4 | Inline badges, tool call chips |
| sm | 8 | Small buttons, input fields, thumbnails |
| md | 14 | Cards, panels, option buttons |
| lg | 20 | Message bubbles, composer bar |
| pill | 999 | Status dots, segmented control, avatars |

**Key change**: Currently everything is borderRadius 8. Distinct radii create instant visual taxonomy — bubbles feel conversational at 20, cards feel like surfaces at 14, controls feel tappable at 8.

### Shadow / Elevation

| Level | Shadow | Use |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | None | Flat elements, inline items |
| 1 | `offset: {0,1}, radius: 3, opacity: 0.15` | Raised cards, option buttons |
| 2 | `offset: {0,4}, radius: 12, opacity: 0.25` | Composer bar, floating panels |
| 3 | `offset: {0,8}, radius: 24, opacity: 0.35` | Modals, overlays |

**Rule**: Use shadows instead of borders for elevated surfaces. Use borders for flat/inset surfaces. Never combine both.

### Button Hierarchy

| Variant | Background | Text | Border | Radius |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Primary | `#12B89E` solid | `#FFFFFF` w600 | None | sm (8) |
| Secondary | transparent | `#12B89E` w600 | 1px `#12B89E` | sm (8) |
| Tertiary | transparent | `#12B89E` w600 | None | sm (8) |
| Ghost | `rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` | `#5C5650` w600 | None | sm (8) |
| Destructive | `#E8544E` | `#FFFFFF` w600 | None | sm (8) |

All buttons: min-height 44, horizontal padding 16. Primary gets shadow level 1. Disabled: 40% opacity.

---

## 6. Chat Screen Redesign (app/index.tsx)

### 6.1 Header

**Current**: "Private phone brain" eyebrow + "Jeff" 32px title + 3 text buttons (New, Brain, Settings)
**New**:
- Drop the eyebrow (move it to empty state)
- Keep "Jeff" as 34px Display weight title, left-aligned
- Replace text buttons with 36px emoji-only ghost circles: `✨` `🧠` `⚙️`
- On scroll: collapse header from 60pt to 44pt using `useAnimatedStyle` + `interpolate` driven by FlatList `onScroll` contentOffset.y. Title shrinks from 34px to 20px and centres. Reclaims ~30pt on scroll.

### 6.2 Status Panel

**Current**: Full glass surface panel always visible — provider badge, model status, generation status, error actions. Takes ~100pt of vertical space.
**New**:
- Replace with a single-line **status pill** (28pt tall) between header and messages
- Shows: coloured dot (green=ready, amber=loading, red=error) + terse label like "Gemma 4 E4B ready"
- Tap to expand into a bottom sheet (reanimated spring + gesture-handler pan-to-dismiss) showing full provider detail, model info, download progress, error actions
- When downloading: thin progress bar behind the pill text
- When generating: dot pulses with `withRepeat(withTiming)` loop
- Net savings: ~80pt of vertical space in default state

### 6.3 Message Bubbles

**Current**: borderRadius 8, role labels ("You", "Jeff"), dense metadata, same visual weight as cards
**New**:
- `borderRadius: 20` with asymmetric tails: user bottom-right → 6, assistant bottom-left → 6
- **Drop role labels entirely** — alignment is enough (right = user, left = Jeff)
- Show 24px Jeff avatar circle (teal "J" monogram) to the left of first message in a consecutive assistant run
- User bubble: solid `#12B89E` with white text
- Assistant bubble: `#F3EFEC` with `#1A1A1A` text, subtle `#E2DCD7` border
- Max-width: 82%, padding: 14h / 10v
- Thinking disclosure: chevron icon (`▶`/`▼`) instead of "Show"/"Hide" text
- Tool call pills: inline capsules with tinted background, no border, xs radius (4)
- Image grid: `borderRadius: 14`, 2-up layout, aspect ratio preserved
- Speech button (Play/Stop): moves from meta row to **long-press context menu**
- Route detail at bottom becomes subtle timestamp ("2s ago") or "Cloud" only if non-local
- Provider badge hidden from individual messages (shown in status pill instead)

### 6.4 Composer

**Current**: Glass surface box with 3 text buttons (Photo, File, Mic) + Send/Stop, staged attachment tray, voice tray
**New**:
- Composer bar: `borderRadius: 20`, shadow level 2, no border — feels like single cohesive surface
- Input field: no visible boundary, just padding inside the surface. `borderRadius: 20`
- Replace 3 attachment buttons with a **"+" circle** (36px, ghost style) on the left
  - Tap expands a horizontal tray of emoji-only buttons (`🖼️`, `📎`, `🎙️`) via `withSpring` fan-out animation
  - Staggered by 30ms per icon
- Send button: **44px teal circle** with `⬆️` emoji
  - When generating: morphs into coral `⏹️` stop circle (shared layout transition)
  - Press feedback: `withSequence(withTiming(0.92, 80ms), withTiming(1, 140ms))` scale bounce
- Staged attachments: render as **overlapping thumbnail chips** above the input (like iMessage), not a separate tray with header

### 6.5 Voice Experience

**Current**: Voice tray floats above composer with text labels, no animation
**New**:
- **Voice strip mode**: tapping mic collapses input to zero height, replaced by:
  - Centred animated waveform (3 bars oscillating via `withRepeat` + staggered `withDelay`)
  - Voice status label above waveform (with emoji: `👂 Listening`)
  - Partial transcript types in below with blinking cursor
  - Single "End" pill where send button was
- **Full-screen voice mode**: pull up from voice strip (pan gesture, 120pt threshold):
  - Teal-to-coral gradient background
  - Large pulsing concentric rings (reanimated scale + opacity loops)
  - Transcript in large centred text
  - Prominent stop button at bottom
  - Pull down to dismiss back to strip
- Haptics: `impactAsync(Medium)` on recording start, `notificationAsync(Success)` on transcription complete

### 6.6 Empty State

**Current**: Plain text "Jeff is ready for a chat." + instruction copy
**New**:
- Large 64px "J" monogram in a teal circle, centred
- "Hey, I'm Jeff 💬" in 22px Heading weight
- "Your private on-device brain. Everything stays on this phone." in 15px Body, `#5C5650`
- Two **suggestion chips** in ghost pill shapes below: "Tell me something interesting" / "What can you do?"
  - Tapping fills draft and sends
- Staggered entrance: `FadeIn.delay(200).duration(400)` per element

---

## 7. Settings Screen Redesign (app/settings.tsx)

### 7.1 Overall Layout

**Current**: Dark ScrollView with flat sections separated by hairline borders
**New**:
- Light theme: `#F2F2F7` background (iOS system grouped background)
- **iOS-style inset grouped cards**: white `#FFFFFF` rounded rectangles (borderRadius 14), shadow level 1
- Rows separated by `#E2DCD7` hairlines inset 16px from left edge
- Section headers: uppercase eyebrow style, `#5C5650`, 24px above each group
- 20px vertical gap between card groups
- Header: large "Settings" title (34px, 700 weight), `✓ Done` button top-right (no border, teal text)
- Drop the eyebrow and model status subtitle from header

### 7.2 Sections

**📦 AI Model** (replaces "Local Model"):
- Each model option: row with label left, teal checkmark right when selected
- Below: "📦 Load model" / "📤 Unload" action rows
- Download state: animated progress bar (4px rounded track, teal fill, percentage label)
- Error: inline `#E8544E` text below progress area

**🔀 Provider** (replaces "Provider Mode"):
- Segmented control at top: pill-radius container, teal selected segment, spring animation
- Below: provider radio rows with checkmarks (same pattern as model)

**💬 Conversation**:
- Toggle rows with emoji prefixes: `🎙️ Voice`, `🧠 Remember conversations`, `🔧 Dev mode`
- Switch trackColor: teal on / `#EDE8E4` off
- "✨ New chat" as tappable row with forward chevron

**🧠 Memory**:
- Top row: "Stored memories" left, count badge right (teal pill, white text)
- "🧠 Manage" tappable row with forward chevron
- "🔄 Refresh" tappable row
- Last extraction as footer text below card group

**🔍 Developer** (hidden when devMode is false):
- Only visible when dev mode toggle is on
- Contains: runtime profile, model ID, model status, generation status, multimodal note
- Simple label/value rows in muted caption style

### 7.3 Model Download Progress

Replace text-only `formatDownload` with visual progress bar:
- Track: `height: 4, borderRadius: 2, backgroundColor: #EDE8E4`
- Fill: `width: ${percentage}%`, `backgroundColor: #12B89E`, animated with `withTiming(400ms)`
- Subtle shimmer overlay using `withRepeat` on opacity
- Label below: "Downloading Gemma 4 E4B — 67%" in caption style

---

## 8. Memories Screen Redesign (app/memories.tsx)

### 8.1 Memory Cards

**Current**: Dark cards with name, type/date meta, preview, tags, raw file path, Delete + Show details buttons
**New**:
- Light cards (white, borderRadius 14, shadow level 1)
- Top: name in 17px Subheading weight + type pill (capsule, `#EDE8E4` bg, `#5C5650` text)
- Below: preview text in 15px Body, max 3 lines with ellipsis
- Bottom row: tags as small tinted pills (`#12B89E` at 10% opacity bg, teal text) + relative date ("2 days ago") right-aligned
- **Remove file path** from default view (only show in dev mode expanded detail)
- **Tap card to expand** (not a separate button) — smooth `Layout.duration(280)` height animation
- Expanded: content, index entry, created date below hairline divider

### 8.2 Delete Flow

**Current**: Always-visible red "Delete" button on every card
**New**:
- Remove visible delete button entirely
- **Swipe-to-delete** on card (using gesture-handler `Swipeable`)
- Reveals coral "Forget" action pane
- Confirmation alert: "Forget this memory?" with "Keep" / "Forget" buttons
- Delete animation: card scales to 0.95 + fades out (250ms)
- Haptic: `notificationAsync(Success)` on confirm

### 8.3 Empty State

- Large 48px 🧠 emoji centred
- "Jeff hasn't stored any memories yet" in 20px Heading
- "As you chat, Jeff will remember the important things about you." in 15px Body, `#5C5650`
- No bordered container — just centred text on `#FAF7F5` background

### 8.4 Search & Filter

Add search bar at top (below header):
- `#EDE8E4` rounded rect, `#9B9490` placeholder "Search memories"
- Below: horizontal ScrollView of tag filter pills
- Active filter: teal bg with white text
- Client-side filter over `memoryNotes` array via `useMemo`

### 8.5 Activity Log

- **Hidden by default**. Only visible when `devMode` is on
- Collapsible section at bottom: "Recent activity" with disclosure chevron
- Simplified entries: tool name left, status pill (green/amber/red), timestamp

---

## 9. Animation Plan

### Tier 1 — Must-Have (ship-blocking quality)

| Animation | Approach | Timing | Haptic |
|---|---|---|---|
| **New message appear** | `entering` prop: user `SlideInRight.duration(280)`, assistant `FadeIn.duration(220).delay(60)` | 220-280ms | — |
| **Send button press** | `useAnimatedStyle` scale: `withSequence(withTiming(0.92, 80ms), withTiming(1, 140ms))` | 220ms | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| **Voice state transitions** | Voice tray: `FadeIn(200)` / `FadeOut(160)`. Mic pulse: `withRepeat(scale 1→1.12, 600ms)` | 200ms+ | `impactAsync(Medium)` start |
| **Thinking expand/collapse** | Content: `FadeIn(180)` / `FadeOut(120)`. Parent: `Layout.duration(250)` | 250ms | — |
| **Staged attachment appear/remove** | `FadeIn(200).springify()` / `FadeOut(150)` + `Layout` for reflow | 200ms | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| **Status panel collapse/expand** | Content: `Layout.duration(300)`. Error buttons: `FadeIn(200).delay(100)` | 300ms | — |

### Tier 2 — High Impact Polish

| Animation | Approach | Timing | Haptic |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Attachment tray slide** | `SlideInDown(250)` / `SlideOutDown(180)` | 250ms | — |
| **Memory card expand** | Detail: `FadeIn(200)`. Card: `Layout.duration(280)` | 280ms | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| **Memory card delete** | `FadeOut(250)` + `ZoomOut(250)` scale to 0.95 | 250ms | `notificationAsync(Success)` |
| **Memory card entrance stagger** | `FadeInDown.delay(index * 60).duration(300)` capped at 8 cards | 300ms + stagger | — |
| **Option selection** | Border/bg colour `withTiming(200ms)` interpolation | 200ms | `selectionAsync()` |
| **Progress bar** | Width `withTiming(400ms, Easing.out(Easing.quad))` + shimmer overlay | 400ms | — |

### Tier 3 — Nice-to-Have

| Animation | Notes |
|---|---|
| **Streaming cursor** | Blinking 1px `Animated.View` at end of text, `withRepeat` opacity 0↔1 at 500ms |
| **Header collapse on scroll** | `interpolate(scrollY, [0, 60], [60, 44])` on header height |
| **Composer + fan-out** | `withSpring` on `translateX` for each icon, staggered 30ms |
| **Segmented control** | Selected pill slides with spring animation |

### Global Easing Convention

- **Entrances**: `Easing.out(Easing.cubic)` — fast start, gentle land
- **Exits**: `Easing.in(Easing.cubic)`
- **Layout shifts**: `Easing.inOut(Easing.cubic)`
- **Duration range**: 140-300ms. Nothing exceeds 400ms.

### Haptic Feedback Map

| Moment | Type |
|---|---|
| Send message | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| Start recording | `impactAsync(Medium)` |
| Transcription done | `notificationAsync(Success)` |
| Attachment added/removed | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| Option/toggle selection | `selectionAsync()` |
| Memory deleted | `notificationAsync(Success)` |
| Error displayed | `notificationAsync(Error)` |
| Header button press | `impactAsync(Light)` |

**Dependency**: Add `expo-haptics` package.

---

## 10. Gesture Interactions

| Gesture | Location | Action |
|---|---|---|
| **Long-press bubble** | Chat messages | Context menu: Copy, Speak, Route info (spring-in overlay) |
| **Double-tap bubble** | Chat messages | Copy text to clipboard + brief "Copied" toast |
| **Swipe left on assistant bubble** | Chat messages | Reveal "Reply" action strip (quote-reply into composer) |
| **Swipe left on memory card** | Memories | Reveal "Forget" delete action |
| **Pull up voice strip** | Composer | Expand to full-screen voice mode |
| **Pull down voice overlay** | Full-screen voice | Dismiss to voice strip |
| **Pan to dismiss** | Status bottom sheet | Close expanded status panel |

---

## 11. Files to Modify

### Core Changes

| File | Scope |
|---|---|
| `app/_layout.tsx` | StatusBar style → "dark", contentStyle background → `#FAF7F5` |
| `app/index.tsx` | Full rewrite of styles + component restructuring (header, status, bubbles, composer, voice, empty state) |
| `app/settings.tsx` | Full rewrite of styles + section restructuring, dev mode gating |
| `app/memories.tsx` | Full rewrite of styles + card redesign, swipe-to-delete, search, dev mode gating |
| `global.css` | No changes needed (just Tailwind directives) |

### New Dependencies

| Package | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `expo-haptics` | Tactile feedback on interactions |

### Optional New Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `lib/theme.ts` | Centralised colour tokens, spacing scale, shadow presets |
| `components/StatusPill.tsx` | Collapsible status indicator component |
| `components/VoiceOverlay.tsx` | Full-screen voice mode component |

---

## 12. Implementation Order

### Phase 1: Foundation (do first)

1. **Create `lib/theme.ts`** — define all colour tokens, spacing scale, border radii, shadows as exported constants
2. **Update `_layout.tsx`** — StatusBar dark, light background
3. **Rewrite `app/index.tsx` styles** — apply new colour system to all existing StyleSheet entries
4. **Rewrite `app/settings.tsx` styles** — same treatment
5. **Rewrite `app/memories.tsx` styles** — same treatment

### Phase 2: Emoji & Button Overhaul

6. **Replace all text buttons with emojis** across all 3 screens (see mapping in section 3)
7. **Reshape buttons** — apply new border radius scale, shadow elevation, button hierarchy
8. **Update message bubbles** — new border radius (20), asymmetric tails, drop role labels

### Phase 3: Layout Restructuring

9. **Collapse status panel** into status pill + expandable bottom sheet
10. **Redesign composer** — "+" fan-out, circular send button, overlapping attachment chips
11. **Redesign settings sections** — iOS grouped card style, dev mode gating
12. **Redesign memory cards** — tap to expand, hide file paths, swipe-to-delete
13. **Add empty state redesign** with monogram + suggestion chips
14. **Add search bar** to memories screen

### Phase 4: Animation & Polish

15. **Add `expo-haptics`** dependency
16. **Implement Tier 1 animations** — message appear, send bounce, voice pulse, thinking expand
17. **Implement Tier 2 animations** — attachment tray, memory card expand/delete, option selection, progress bar
18. **Implement gesture interactions** — long-press context menu, swipe-to-delete, double-tap copy
19. **Voice overlay** — voice strip mode + full-screen voice mode with waveform

### Phase 5: Final Polish

20. **Typography audit** — replace all 800/900 weights with the new scale
21. **Spacing audit** — align all padding/margins to 4px grid
22. **Accessibility pass** — ensure all emoji buttons have proper accessibilityLabels
23. **Test on device** — verify colours, readability, animations, haptics on real iPhone

---

## 13. Key Principles

- **Every component gets a distinct visual identity** — bubbles ≠ cards ≠ buttons
- **Silence the noise** — hide developer details behind dev mode toggle
- **Emoji > text** for compact actions; emoji + text for full-width actions
- **Animate the moments that matter** — message appear, send, voice — not everything
- **Warm, not clinical** — cream base, no pure white backgrounds, teal + coral accents
- **Respect the phone** — reclaim vertical space (status pill, collapsed header, removed role labels)
- **Accessible throughout** — 4.5:1+ contrast on all text/bg pairs, 44px touch targets, screen reader labels

toolUseResult.content:
# Jeff Phone — UI/UX Redesign Plan

**App**: Jeff Phone (React Native / Expo, on-device Gemma AI chat)
**Goal**: Transform from dark developer-tool aesthetic to a bright, modern, polished consumer app
**Screens**: Chat (index.tsx), Settings (settings.tsx), Memories (memories.tsx)

---

## 1. Design Direction

**From**: Ultra-dark (#080a0f), flat, text-heavy, developer-facing, no animations
**To**: Warm cream-white base, vibrant teal + coral accents, emoji-driven actions, animated and alive

The redesign leans into a **warm, friendly AI companion** feel — think premium consumer chat app, not a debug console. Every surface should feel intentional, every interaction should have tactile feedback, and the overall tone should say "your personal brain" not "a model inference dashboard."

---

## 2. Colour System

### Backgrounds

| Role | Old | New | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Root | `#080a0f` | `#FAF7F5` | Warm cream-white, easy on the eyes |
| Card / Panel | `#10141d` | `#FFFFFF` | Pure white elevated surfaces |
| Glass fallback | `#10141d` | `#F3EFEC` | Slightly warmer for layered areas |
| Secondary surface | `#171b25` | `#EDE8E4` | Settings section groups |
| Divider | `#1c2230` | `#E2DCD7` | Subtle warm grey separator |

### Text

| Role | Old | New |
|---|---|---|
| Primary | `#f4f7fb` | `#1A1A1A` |
| Secondary | `#9aa3b5` | `#5C5650` |
| Muted / placeholder | `#737987` | `#9B9490` |
| On-accent (dark bg) | `#07110f` | `#FFFFFF` |
| On-accent (light bg) | N/A | `#0E4F47` |

### Accents

| Role | Hex | Use |
|---|---|---|
| Primary (teal) | `#12B89E` | Send button, links, active states, toggles |
| Primary pressed | `#0E9C86` | Press/hover state |
| Secondary (coral) | `#F2785C` | Voice active, highlights, warmth |
| Success | `#2ECC87` | Model ready, completion states |
| Warning | `#F0A93A` | Downloading, processing states |
| Error | `#E8544E` | Errors, destructive hints |

### Message Bubbles

| Role | Background | Text | Border |
|---|---|---|---|
| User | `#12B89E` | `#FFFFFF` | none |
| Assistant | `#F3EFEC` | `#1A1A1A` | `#E2DCD7` |
| Tool | `#FFF4E6` | `#5C5650` | `#F0D9B5` |
| System | `#EDE8E4` | `#9B9490` | none |

### Buttons

| State | Background | Text | Border |
|---|---|---|---|
| Primary | `#12B89E` | `#FFFFFF` | none |
| Primary pressed | `#0E9C86` | `#FFFFFF` | none |
| Secondary | `#F3EFEC` | `#12B89E` | `#D4CEC9` |
| Ghost | `rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` | `#5C5650` | none |
| Disabled | `#EDE8E4` | `#9B9490` | none |
| Destructive | `#FDEEED` | `#E8544E` | none |
| Selected option | `#E6F9F5` | `#0E4F47` | `#12B89E` |

### Gradients

- **Voice panel**: `linear-gradient(135deg, #E6F9F5 0%, #FFF0EB 100%)` — teal-tint to coral-tint
- **Primary button shimmer** (optional): `linear-gradient(90deg, #12B89E 0%, #0ECDB3 100%)`

### StatusBar

Change from `style="light"` to `style="dark"` in `_layout.tsx`. Update `contentStyle` background to `#FAF7F5`.

---

## 3. Emoji Button Mapping

### Chat Screen — Emoji-Only Compact Buttons (18-20pt)

| Current | Emoji | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **New** | `✨` | Header pill, accessibilityLabel="New chat" |
| **Brain** | `🧠` | Header pill, semantically perfect |
| **Settings** | `⚙️` | Header pill, universal |
| **Photo** | `🖼️` | Composer button (alt: `📷`) |
| **File** | `📎` | Composer button |
| **Mic** | `🎙️` | Idle state |
| **End** (voice) | `⏹️` | Listening state (tinted via voiceActiveButton style) |
| **Stop** (voice) | `⏹️` | Speaking state |
| **Cancel** (voice) | `✖️` | Connecting/requesting state |
| **Send** | `⬆️` | 20pt in primary teal circle (iOS Messages convention) |
| **Stop** (generation) | `⏹️` | 20pt in coral cancel button |
| **Play** (speech) | `🔊` | 14pt mini bubble button |
| **Stop** (speech) | `⏹️` | 14pt when active |
| **Show/Hide** (thinking) | `▶` / `▼` | 12pt disclosure chevrons |
| **Clear** (attachments) | `🗑️` | 14pt tray header |
| **X** (remove) | `✕` | Keep as-is (already single glyph in 24x24 badge) |

### Settings & Memories — Emoji + Label (14pt prefix)

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| **Done** | `✓ Done` |
| **Load model** | `📦 Load model` |
| **Reload model** | `🔄 Reload` |
| **Retry model** | `🔄 Retry` |
| **Working...** | `⏳ Working...` |
| **Unload** | `📤 Unload` |
| **Manage memories** | `🧠 Manage` |
| **Refresh** | `🔄 Refresh` |
| **New chat** | `✨ New chat` |
| **Manual** | `🔧 Manual` |
| **Smart** | `🤖 Smart` |
| **Delete** | `🗑️ Delete` |
| **Show/Hide details** | `▶ Show details` / `▼ Hide details` |

### Non-Button Emoji Additions

| Location | Addition |
|---|---|
| Empty state (chat) | `💬 Jeff is ready for a chat.` |
| Empty state (memories) | `🧠 No memories yet` |
| Voice tray labels | `👂 Listening`, `🔊 Speaking`, `✍️ Transcribing` |
| Generation status | `⚡ Now streaming`, `🤔 Thinking`, `🔧 Using tools` |
| Error text | Prefix all with `⚠️` |
| Section headers (settings) | `📦 Local Model`, `🧠 Memory`, `🔀 Provider Mode`, `💬 Conversation`, `🔍 Runtime Diagnostics` |
| Tool call pills | `✅ done`, `⏳ running`, `❌ failed` prefixes |
| Staged file preview | `📄` emoji centred in thumbnail |

---

## 4. Typography System

### Type Scale

| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Display | 34 | 700 | 40 | -0.5 | Screen titles ("Jeff") |
| Heading | 22 | 700 | 28 | -0.3 | Page titles ("Settings", "Memories") |
| Subheading | 17 | 600 | 22 | -0.2 | Section titles, card names |
| Body | 15 | 400 | 22 | 0 | Message text, descriptions |
| Body Bold | 15 | 600 | 22 | 0 | Option labels, status values |
| Caption | 13 | 500 | 18 | 0 | Detail text, subtitles |
| Eyebrow | 11 | 700 | 14 | 0.8 | Uppercase labels |
| Micro | 10 | 600 | 13 | 0.5 | Timestamps, badge text |

**Font**: System font (San Francisco). Native feel, zero bundle cost. Brand personality comes from colour and layout.

**Key change**: Drop 800/900 font weights entirely. Currently everything screams at the same volume. Use 400 for conversational text, 600 for interactive labels, 700 for titles only.

### Spacing Scale

Base unit: **4px**. Use multiples: 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 48.

| Context | Old | New |
|---|---|---|
| Screen horizontal padding | 18px | 20px (5x) |
| Gap between list items | 12px | 12px (3x) |
| Section vertical padding | varies | 24px (6x) |
| Button height | 40px | 44px (Apple HIG minimum) |

---

## 5. Component Design Language

### Border Radius Scale

| Token | Value | Use |
|---|---|---|
| xs | 4 | Inline badges, tool call chips |
| sm | 8 | Small buttons, input fields, thumbnails |
| md | 14 | Cards, panels, option buttons |
| lg | 20 | Message bubbles, composer bar |
| pill | 999 | Status dots, segmented control, avatars |

**Key change**: Currently everything is borderRadius 8. Distinct radii create instant visual taxonomy — bubbles feel conversational at 20, cards feel like surfaces at 14, controls feel tappable at 8.

### Shadow / Elevation

| Level | Shadow | Use |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | None | Flat elements, inline items |
| 1 | `offset: {0,1}, radius: 3, opacity: 0.15` | Raised cards, option buttons |
| 2 | `offset: {0,4}, radius: 12, opacity: 0.25` | Composer bar, floating panels |
| 3 | `offset: {0,8}, radius: 24, opacity: 0.35` | Modals, overlays |

**Rule**: Use shadows instead of borders for elevated surfaces. Use borders for flat/inset surfaces. Never combine both.

### Button Hierarchy

| Variant | Background | Text | Border | Radius |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Primary | `#12B89E` solid | `#FFFFFF` w600 | None | sm (8) |
| Secondary | transparent | `#12B89E` w600 | 1px `#12B89E` | sm (8) |
| Tertiary | transparent | `#12B89E` w600 | None | sm (8) |
| Ghost | `rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` | `#5C5650` w600 | None | sm (8) |
| Destructive | `#E8544E` | `#FFFFFF` w600 | None | sm (8) |

All buttons: min-height 44, horizontal padding 16. Primary gets shadow level 1. Disabled: 40% opacity.

---

## 6. Chat Screen Redesign (app/index.tsx)

### 6.1 Header

**Current**: "Private phone brain" eyebrow + "Jeff" 32px title + 3 text buttons (New, Brain, Settings)
**New**:
- Drop the eyebrow (move it to empty state)
- Keep "Jeff" as 34px Display weight title, left-aligned
- Replace text buttons with 36px emoji-only ghost circles: `✨` `🧠` `⚙️`
- On scroll: collapse header from 60pt to 44pt using `useAnimatedStyle` + `interpolate` driven by FlatList `onScroll` contentOffset.y. Title shrinks from 34px to 20px and centres. Reclaims ~30pt on scroll.

### 6.2 Status Panel

**Current**: Full glass surface panel always visible — provider badge, model status, generation status, error actions. Takes ~100pt of vertical space.
**New**:
- Replace with a single-line **status pill** (28pt tall) between header and messages
- Shows: coloured dot (green=ready, amber=loading, red=error) + terse label like "Gemma 4 E4B ready"
- Tap to expand into a bottom sheet (reanimated spring + gesture-handler pan-to-dismiss) showing full provider detail, model info, download progress, error actions
- When downloading: thin progress bar behind the pill text
- When generating: dot pulses with `withRepeat(withTiming)` loop
- Net savings: ~80pt of vertical space in default state

### 6.3 Message Bubbles

**Current**: borderRadius 8, role labels ("You", "Jeff"), dense metadata, same visual weight as cards
**New**:
- `borderRadius: 20` with asymmetric tails: user bottom-right → 6, assistant bottom-left → 6
- **Drop role labels entirely** — alignment is enough (right = user, left = Jeff)
- Show 24px Jeff avatar circle (teal "J" monogram) to the left of first message in a consecutive assistant run
- User bubble: solid `#12B89E` with white text
- Assistant bubble: `#F3EFEC` with `#1A1A1A` text, subtle `#E2DCD7` border
- Max-width: 82%, padding: 14h / 10v
- Thinking disclosure: chevron icon (`▶`/`▼`) instead of "Show"/"Hide" text
- Tool call pills: inline capsules with tinted background, no border, xs radius (4)
- Image grid: `borderRadius: 14`, 2-up layout, aspect ratio preserved
- Speech button (Play/Stop): moves from meta row to **long-press context menu**
- Route detail at bottom becomes subtle timestamp ("2s ago") or "Cloud" only if non-local
- Provider badge hidden from individual messages (shown in status pill instead)

### 6.4 Composer

**Current**: Glass surface box with 3 text buttons (Photo, File, Mic) + Send/Stop, staged attachment tray, voice tray
**New**:
- Composer bar: `borderRadius: 20`, shadow level 2, no border — feels like single cohesive surface
- Input field: no visible boundary, just padding inside the surface. `borderRadius: 20`
- Replace 3 attachment buttons with a **"+" circle** (36px, ghost style) on the left
  - Tap expands a horizontal tray of emoji-only buttons (`🖼️`, `📎`, `🎙️`) via `withSpring` fan-out animation
  - Staggered by 30ms per icon
- Send button: **44px teal circle** with `⬆️` emoji
  - When generating: morphs into coral `⏹️` stop circle (shared layout transition)
  - Press feedback: `withSequence(withTiming(0.92, 80ms), withTiming(1, 140ms))` scale bounce
- Staged attachments: render as **overlapping thumbnail chips** above the input (like iMessage), not a separate tray with header

### 6.5 Voice Experience

**Current**: Voice tray floats above composer with text labels, no animation
**New**:
- **Voice strip mode**: tapping mic collapses input to zero height, replaced by:
  - Centred animated waveform (3 bars oscillating via `withRepeat` + staggered `withDelay`)
  - Voice status label above waveform (with emoji: `👂 Listening`)
  - Partial transcript types in below with blinking cursor
  - Single "End" pill where send button was
- **Full-screen voice mode**: pull up from voice strip (pan gesture, 120pt threshold):
  - Teal-to-coral gradient background
  - Large pulsing concentric rings (reanimated scale + opacity loops)
  - Transcript in large centred text
  - Prominent stop button at bottom
  - Pull down to dismiss back to strip
- Haptics: `impactAsync(Medium)` on recording start, `notificationAsync(Success)` on transcription complete

### 6.6 Empty State

**Current**: Plain text "Jeff is ready for a chat." + instruction copy
**New**:
- Large 64px "J" monogram in a teal circle, centred
- "Hey, I'm Jeff 💬" in 22px Heading weight
- "Your private on-device brain. Everything stays on this phone." in 15px Body, `#5C5650`
- Two **suggestion chips** in ghost pill shapes below: "Tell me something interesting" / "What can you do?"
  - Tapping fills draft and sends
- Staggered entrance: `FadeIn.delay(200).duration(400)` per element

---

## 7. Settings Screen Redesign (app/settings.tsx)

### 7.1 Overall Layout

**Current**: Dark ScrollView with flat sections separated by hairline borders
**New**:
- Light theme: `#F2F2F7` background (iOS system grouped background)
- **iOS-style inset grouped cards**: white `#FFFFFF` rounded rectangles (borderRadius 14), shadow level 1
- Rows separated by `#E2DCD7` hairlines inset 16px from left edge
- Section headers: uppercase eyebrow style, `#5C5650`, 24px above each group
- 20px vertical gap between card groups
- Header: large "Settings" title (34px, 700 weight), `✓ Done` button top-right (no border, teal text)
- Drop the eyebrow and model status subtitle from header

### 7.2 Sections

**📦 AI Model** (replaces "Local Model"):
- Each model option: row with label left, teal checkmark right when selected
- Below: "📦 Load model" / "📤 Unload" action rows
- Download state: animated progress bar (4px rounded track, teal fill, percentage label)
- Error: inline `#E8544E` text below progress area

**🔀 Provider** (replaces "Provider Mode"):
- Segmented control at top: pill-radius container, teal selected segment, spring animation
- Below: provider radio rows with checkmarks (same pattern as model)

**💬 Conversation**:
- Toggle rows with emoji prefixes: `🎙️ Voice`, `🧠 Remember conversations`, `🔧 Dev mode`
- Switch trackColor: teal on / `#EDE8E4` off
- "✨ New chat" as tappable row with forward chevron

**🧠 Memory**:
- Top row: "Stored memories" left, count badge right (teal pill, white text)
- "🧠 Manage" tappable row with forward chevron
- "🔄 Refresh" tappable row
- Last extraction as footer text below card group

**🔍 Developer** (hidden when devMode is false):
- Only visible when dev mode toggle is on
- Contains: runtime profile, model ID, model status, generation status, multimodal note
- Simple label/value rows in muted caption style

### 7.3 Model Download Progress

Replace text-only `formatDownload` with visual progress bar:
- Track: `height: 4, borderRadius: 2, backgroundColor: #EDE8E4`
- Fill: `width: ${percentage}%`, `backgroundColor: #12B89E`, animated with `withTiming(400ms)`
- Subtle shimmer overlay using `withRepeat` on opacity
- Label below: "Downloading Gemma 4 E4B — 67%" in caption style

---

## 8. Memories Screen Redesign (app/memories.tsx)

### 8.1 Memory Cards

**Current**: Dark cards with name, type/date meta, preview, tags, raw file path, Delete + Show details buttons
**New**:
- Light cards (white, borderRadius 14, shadow level 1)
- Top: name in 17px Subheading weight + type pill (capsule, `#EDE8E4` bg, `#5C5650` text)
- Below: preview text in 15px Body, max 3 lines with ellipsis
- Bottom row: tags as small tinted pills (`#12B89E` at 10% opacity bg, teal text) + relative date ("2 days ago") right-aligned
- **Remove file path** from default view (only show in dev mode expanded detail)
- **Tap card to expand** (not a separate button) — smooth `Layout.duration(280)` height animation
- Expanded: content, index entry, created date below hairline divider

### 8.2 Delete Flow

**Current**: Always-visible red "Delete" button on every card
**New**:
- Remove visible delete button entirely
- **Swipe-to-delete** on card (using gesture-handler `Swipeable`)
- Reveals coral "Forget" action pane
- Confirmation alert: "Forget this memory?" with "Keep" / "Forget" buttons
- Delete animation: card scales to 0.95 + fades out (250ms)
- Haptic: `notificationAsync(Success)` on confirm

### 8.3 Empty State

- Large 48px 🧠 emoji centred
- "Jeff hasn't stored any memories yet" in 20px Heading
- "As you chat, Jeff will remember the important things about you." in 15px Body, `#5C5650`
- No bordered container — just centred text on `#FAF7F5` background

### 8.4 Search & Filter

Add search bar at top (below header):
- `#EDE8E4` rounded rect, `#9B9490` placeholder "Search memories"
- Below: horizontal ScrollView of tag filter pills
- Active filter: teal bg with white text
- Client-side filter over `memoryNotes` array via `useMemo`

### 8.5 Activity Log

- **Hidden by default**. Only visible when `devMode` is on
- Collapsible section at bottom: "Recent activity" with disclosure chevron
- Simplified entries: tool name left, status pill (green/amber/red), timestamp

---

## 9. Animation Plan

### Tier 1 — Must-Have (ship-blocking quality)

| Animation | Approach | Timing | Haptic |
|---|---|---|---|
| **New message appear** | `entering` prop: user `SlideInRight.duration(280)`, assistant `FadeIn.duration(220).delay(60)` | 220-280ms | — |
| **Send button press** | `useAnimatedStyle` scale: `withSequence(withTiming(0.92, 80ms), withTiming(1, 140ms))` | 220ms | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| **Voice state transitions** | Voice tray: `FadeIn(200)` / `FadeOut(160)`. Mic pulse: `withRepeat(scale 1→1.12, 600ms)` | 200ms+ | `impactAsync(Medium)` start |
| **Thinking expand/collapse** | Content: `FadeIn(180)` / `FadeOut(120)`. Parent: `Layout.duration(250)` | 250ms | — |
| **Staged attachment appear/remove** | `FadeIn(200).springify()` / `FadeOut(150)` + `Layout` for reflow | 200ms | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| **Status panel collapse/expand** | Content: `Layout.duration(300)`. Error buttons: `FadeIn(200).delay(100)` | 300ms | — |

### Tier 2 — High Impact Polish

| Animation | Approach | Timing | Haptic |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Attachment tray slide** | `SlideInDown(250)` / `SlideOutDown(180)` | 250ms | — |
| **Memory card expand** | Detail: `FadeIn(200)`. Card: `Layout.duration(280)` | 280ms | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| **Memory card delete** | `FadeOut(250)` + `ZoomOut(250)` scale to 0.95 | 250ms | `notificationAsync(Success)` |
| **Memory card entrance stagger** | `FadeInDown.delay(index * 60).duration(300)` capped at 8 cards | 300ms + stagger | — |
| **Option selection** | Border/bg colour `withTiming(200ms)` interpolation | 200ms | `selectionAsync()` |
| **Progress bar** | Width `withTiming(400ms, Easing.out(Easing.quad))` + shimmer overlay | 400ms | — |

### Tier 3 — Nice-to-Have

| Animation | Notes |
|---|---|
| **Streaming cursor** | Blinking 1px `Animated.View` at end of text, `withRepeat` opacity 0↔1 at 500ms |
| **Header collapse on scroll** | `interpolate(scrollY, [0, 60], [60, 44])` on header height |
| **Composer + fan-out** | `withSpring` on `translateX` for each icon, staggered 30ms |
| **Segmented control** | Selected pill slides with spring animation |

### Global Easing Convention

- **Entrances**: `Easing.out(Easing.cubic)` — fast start, gentle land
- **Exits**: `Easing.in(Easing.cubic)`
- **Layout shifts**: `Easing.inOut(Easing.cubic)`
- **Duration range**: 140-300ms. Nothing exceeds 400ms.

### Haptic Feedback Map

| Moment | Type |
|---|---|
| Send message | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| Start recording | `impactAsync(Medium)` |
| Transcription done | `notificationAsync(Success)` |
| Attachment added/removed | `impactAsync(Light)` |
| Option/toggle selection | `selectionAsync()` |
| Memory deleted | `notificationAsync(Success)` |
| Error displayed | `notificationAsync(Error)` |
| Header button press | `impactAsync(Light)` |

**Dependency**: Add `expo-haptics` package.

---

## 10. Gesture Interactions

| Gesture | Location | Action |
|---|---|---|
| **Long-press bubble** | Chat messages | Context menu: Copy, Speak, Route info (spring-in overlay) |
| **Double-tap bubble** | Chat messages | Copy text to clipboard + brief "Copied" toast |
| **Swipe left on assistant bubble** | Chat messages | Reveal "Reply" action strip (quote-reply into composer) |
| **Swipe left on memory card** | Memories | Reveal "Forget" delete action |
| **Pull up voice strip** | Composer | Expand to full-screen voice mode |
| **Pull down voice overlay** | Full-screen voice | Dismiss to voice strip |
| **Pan to dismiss** | Status bottom sheet | Close expanded status panel |

---

## 11. Files to Modify

### Core Changes

| File | Scope |
|---|---|
| `app/_layout.tsx` | StatusBar style → "dark", contentStyle background → `#FAF7F5` |
| `app/index.tsx` | Full rewrite of styles + component restructuring (header, status, bubbles, composer, voice, empty state) |
| `app/settings.tsx` | Full rewrite of styles + section restructuring, dev mode gating |
| `app/memories.tsx` | Full rewrite of styles + card redesign, swipe-to-delete, search, dev mode gating |
| `global.css` | No changes needed (just Tailwind directives) |

### New Dependencies

| Package | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `expo-haptics` | Tactile feedback on interactions |

### Optional New Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `lib/theme.ts` | Centralised colour tokens, spacing scale, shadow presets |
| `components/StatusPill.tsx` | Collapsible status indicator component |
| `components/VoiceOverlay.tsx` | Full-screen voice mode component |

---

## 12. Implementation Order

### Phase 1: Foundation (do first)

1. **Create `lib/theme.ts`** — define all colour tokens, spacing scale, border radii, shadows as exported constants
2. **Update `_layout.tsx`** — StatusBar dark, light background
3. **Rewrite `app/index.tsx` styles** — apply new colour system to all existing StyleSheet entries
4. **Rewrite `app/settings.tsx` styles** — same treatment
5. **Rewrite `app/memories.tsx` styles** — same treatment

### Phase 2: Emoji & Button Overhaul

6. **Replace all text buttons with emojis** across all 3 screens (see mapping in section 3)
7. **Reshape buttons** — apply new border radius scale, shadow elevation, button hierarchy
8. **Update message bubbles** — new border radius (20), asymmetric tails, drop role labels

### Phase 3: Layout Restructuring

9. **Collapse status panel** into status pill + expandable bottom sheet
10. **Redesign composer** — "+" fan-out, circular send button, overlapping attachment chips
11. **Redesign settings sections** — iOS grouped card style, dev mode gating
12. **Redesign memory cards** — tap to expand, hide file paths, swipe-to-delete
13. **Add empty state redesign** with monogram + suggestion chips
14. **Add search bar** to memories screen

### Phase 4: Animation & Polish

15. **Add `expo-haptics`** dependency
16. **Implement Tier 1 animations** — message appear, send bounce, voice pulse, thinking expand
17. **Implement Tier 2 animations** — attachment tray, memory card expand/delete, option selection, progress bar
18. **Implement gesture interactions** — long-press context menu, swipe-to-delete, double-tap copy
19. **Voice overlay** — voice strip mode + full-screen voice mode with waveform

### Phase 5: Final Polish

20. **Typography audit** — replace all 800/900 weights with the new scale
21. **Spacing audit** — align all padding/margins to 4px grid
22. **Accessibility pass** — ensure all emoji buttons have proper accessibilityLabels
23. **Test on device** — verify colours, readability, animations, haptics on real iPhone

---

## 13. Key Principles

- **Every component gets a distinct visual identity** — bubbles ≠ cards ≠ buttons
- **Silence the noise** — hide developer details behind dev mode toggle
- **Emoji > text** for compact actions; emoji + text for full-width actions
- **Animate the moments that matter** — message appear, send, voice — not everything
- **Warm, not clinical** — cream base, no pure white backgrounds, teal + coral accents
- **Respect the phone** — reclaim vertical space (status pill, collapsed header, removed role labels)
- **Accessible throughout** — 4.5:1+ contrast on all text/bg pairs, 44px touch targets, screen reader labels

input.prompt:
I need to implement a comprehensive UI/UX redesign of a React Native/Expo chat app called "Jeff Phone". The plan is at /Users/alexjay/code/me/big-hack-berlin/ui-redesign-plan.md.

The app has 3 screens:
- app/index.tsx (chat screen — ~1680 lines, massive StyleSheet)
- app/settings.tsx (~610 lines)
- app/memories.tsx (~568 lines)
- app/_layout.tsx (~53 lines)

Key changes:
1. Dark theme (#080a0f) → bright warm cream (#FAF7F5) across all screens
2. Text buttons → emoji buttons (✨, 🧠, ⚙️, 🖼️, 📎, 🎙️, ⬆️, etc.)
3. New colour system (teal #12B89E primary, coral #F2785C accent)
4. New typography scale (drop 800/900 weights, proper hierarchy)
5. New border radius scale (not everything at 8 — bubbles at 20, cards at 14, etc.)
6. Shadow elevation instead of borders for elevated surfaces
7. Message bubbles: asymmetric tails, drop role labels, new colours
8. Status panel: collapse into single-line pill (currently takes ~100pt)
9. Composer: "+" fan-out for attachments, circular send button
10. Settings: iOS grouped card style, dev mode gating for technical sections
11. Memories: tap-to-expand cards, swipe-to-delete, hide file paths
12. Animations via react-native-reanimated (message appear, send bounce, voice pulse, etc.)
13. Haptics via expo-haptics (new dependency)
14. Create lib/theme.ts for centralised design tokens

The app already has: react-native-reanimated 4.2.1, react-native-gesture-handler ~2.30.0, @callstack/liquid-glass, nativewind/tailwindcss, zustand state management.

I need an implementation plan that:
- Breaks this into phases that can be done sequentially
- Identifies which files to create/modify in what order
- Considers that index.tsx is massive and needs careful restructuring
- Keeps the app functional at each step (no breaking changes mid-way)
- Prioritises the most impactful visual changes first

Read the plan file and all the source files to produce a detailed implementation sequence.

content.text:
I now have a thorough understanding of every file, every style, every component, and every piece of state. Here is the complete implementation plan.

---

## Implementation Plan: Jeff Phone UI/UX Redesign

### Structural Overview

The codebase is compact: 4 screen files, a `lib/` directory with 2 files, a `store/` with 6 slices, and `services/` for business logic. There is no `components/` directory yet. The app uses plain `StyleSheet.create` everywhere (no NativeWind className usage in components despite having it configured). All three screens duplicate constants like `BUSY_MODEL_STATUSES`, helper functions like `formatBytes`/`formatDownload`/`friendlyModelError`, and sub-components like `ActionButton`. This duplication is a natural extraction target during the redesign.

---

### Phase 0: Foundation Layer (no visual change yet)

**Goal**: Create the shared infrastructure that all subsequent phases reference. The app looks identical after this phase.

**Step 0.1 -- Create `lib/theme.ts`**

Create a new file at `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/lib/theme.ts` exporting:
- `colors` object with all background, text, accent, bubble, button colour tokens from the plan (section 2). Use nested namespace objects: `colors.bg.root`, `colors.bg.card`, `colors.text.primary`, `colors.accent.teal`, `colors.bubble.user.bg`, etc.
- `radius` object: `{ xs: 4, sm: 8, md: 14, lg: 20, pill: 999 }`
- `shadows` object with 4 levels (0-3), each containing the `shadowColor`, `shadowOffset`, `shadowOpacity`, `shadowRadius`, and `elevation` (for Android)
- `spacing` helper function: `spacing(n: number) => n * 4`
- `typography` object with named presets: `display`, `heading`, `subheading`, `body`, `bodyBold`, `caption`, `eyebrow`, `micro` -- each as a `TextStyle` object containing `fontSize`, `fontWeight`, `lineHeight`, `letterSpacing`
- `buttonStyles` helper factory that takes variant name and returns `{ container: ViewStyle, text: TextStyle }`

This file must be pure constants with zero runtime dependencies (no React, no RN components). It is the single source of truth for the design system.

**Step 0.2 -- Create `lib/haptics.ts`**

Create a thin wrapper module at `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/lib/haptics.ts`. This module should:
- Try to import `expo-haptics` dynamically
- Export named functions: `hapticSend()`, `hapticRecord()`, `hapticTranscribed()`, `hapticAttachment()`, `hapticSelection()`, `hapticDelete()`, `hapticError()`, `hapticButton()`
- Each wraps the appropriate `Haptics.impactAsync`/`notificationAsync`/`selectionAsync` call in a try-catch that silently no-ops if the module is not installed or fails
- This means the new dependency `expo-haptics` can be installed at any point and haptics will "turn on" -- no blocking dependency

**Step 0.3 -- Install `expo-haptics`**

Run: `npx expo install expo-haptics`

This adds the dependency to `package.json`. Requires a native rebuild (`expo prebuild` + pod install), but the haptics wrapper from step 0.2 means code compiles either way.

**Step 0.4 -- Create `components/` directory structure**

Create the following empty component files (scaffolded with basic exports that just re-export current inline behaviour):
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/components/StatusPill.tsx` -- will replace the full `<GlassSurface>` status panel
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/components/MessageBubble.tsx` -- will extract from index.tsx
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/components/Composer.tsx` -- will extract from index.tsx
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/components/VoiceOverlay.tsx` -- will extract from index.tsx
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/components/EmptyState.tsx` -- will extract from index.tsx
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/components/GlassSurface.tsx` -- will extract from index.tsx

Do NOT move any logic yet. Just create the files with placeholder "TODO" comments. This establishes the target component map so later phases have clear destinations.

**Files touched**: create `lib/theme.ts`, create `lib/haptics.ts`, create 6 files in `components/`, modify `package.json` (expo-haptics)

---

### Phase 1: Theme Switch -- Light Mode Foundation

**Goal**: Flip the entire app from dark to light. This is the single most visually impactful change and touches every file. Do it all at once so the app never exists in a half-dark, half-light state.

**Step 1.1 -- Update `app/_layout.tsx`**

Two small changes:
1. Line 39: Change `style="light"` to `style="dark"` on `<StatusBar>` (dark text on light background)
2. Line 43: Change `backgroundColor: '#0a0a0f'` to `backgroundColor: '#FAF7F5'` in `contentStyle`

Import `colors` from `../lib/theme` and use `colors.bg.root` instead of the hex literal.

**Step 1.2 -- Update `app/index.tsx` StyleSheet colours**

This is a mechanical find-and-replace within the `styles` object (lines 1081-1679). Every colour hex needs to change per the mapping in the plan. Key substitutions:
- `#080a0f` (root bg) -> `colors.bg.root` (`#FAF7F5`)
- `#10141d` / `#151a24` (surfaces) -> `colors.bg.card` (`#FFFFFF`)
- `#171b25` / `#202737` / `#202838` (secondary surfaces) -> `colors.bg.secondary` (`#EDE8E4`)
- `#252b3a` / `#283044` / `#293447` / `#344052` / `#30384a` / `#384255` (borders) -> `colors.divider` (`#E2DCD7`)
- `#f4f7fb` / `#f6f7fb` / `#eef2f8` / `#dce3ef` / `#d8deea` / `#d9deea` (primary text) -> `colors.text.primary` (`#1A1A1A`)
- `#9aa3b5` / `#8b93a7` / `#737987` / `#7f8aa0` / `#70798d` / `#a8b0c2` (secondary text) -> `colors.text.secondary` (`#5C5650`)
- `#8be9d4` / `#c8f7e8` / `#9ff0dd` / `#bdf7e8` / `#8fcbb9` / `#8bcdbf` (teal accent text) -> `colors.accent.teal` (`#12B89E`)
- `#245c52` (user bubble) -> `colors.bubble.user.bg` (`#12B89E`)
- `#f6fffb` / `#bbefe2` (user bubble text) -> `#FFFFFF`
- `#16231f` / `#173a33` (teal-tinted bg) -> `colors.bubble.assistant.bg` or contextual equivalent
- `#211b13` (tool bubble) -> `colors.bubble.tool.bg` (`#FFF4E6`)
- `#1c1f29` (system bubble) -> `colors.bubble.system.bg` (`#EDE8E4`)
- `#3a1f27` / `#3a1f28` (destructive bg) -> `colors.button.destructive.bg`
- `#ff9f9f` / `#ff9fb0` / `#ff9b9b` / `#ffd8de` / `#ffc7d2` / `#ffb8c7` (error/destructive text) -> `colors.error` (`#E8544E`)
- `#d6a85a` / `#d0a968` (generation/warning) -> `colors.warning` (`#F0A93A`)
- `#07110f` (on-accent dark) -> `#FFFFFF` (on-accent light) or `colors.text.onAccent`

The `GlassSurface` component needs its fallback and tint colours updated:
- `glassSurfaceFallback` background -> `#F3EFEC`
- `tintColor` default parameter (line 407) -> `rgba(243, 239, 236, 0.72)`
- `colorScheme` in `LiquidGlassView` (line 418) -> `"light"`

All `input` text colour (line 1629) -> `colors.text.primary` (`#1A1A1A`)
`placeholderTextColor` (line 1002) -> `colors.text.muted` (`#9B9490`)

**Step 1.3 -- Update `app/settings.tsx` StyleSheet colours**

Same mechanical substitution across its styles (lines 391-610). The pattern is identical. Replace all dark hex codes with their light counterparts from `lib/theme.ts`.

Key settings-specific changes:
- `root` bg -> `#F2F2F7` (iOS system grouped bg, slightly different from root cream)
- `selectedSegment` bg (line 549) from `#f4f7fb` to `colors.accent.teal` (`#12B89E`)
- `selectedSegmentText` (line 556) stays `#FFFFFF` (white text on teal)
- Switch track colours: add `trackColor={{ false: '#EDE8E4', true: '#12B89E' }}` to `<Switch>` components

**Step 1.4 -- Update `app/memories.tsx` StyleSheet colours**

Same pattern across lines 292-568.
- `headerButton` bg (line 338) from `#8be9d4` to `colors.accent.teal` (`#12B89E`)
- `deleteButton` bg -> `#FDEEED`, text -> `#E8544E`

**Verification**: After this phase, the entire app should render on a cream/white background with dark text and teal accents. All functionality is preserved. No layout changes.

**Files modified**: `app/_layout.tsx`, `app/index.tsx`, `app/settings.tsx`, `app/memories.tsx`. All import `colors` from `lib/theme.ts`.

---

### Phase 2: Typography and Border Radius

**Goal**: Apply the new type scale and radius tokens. This is the second most visually impactful change after the colour flip.

**Step 2.1 -- Typography sweep across all screens**

In each screen's `StyleSheet`, replace raw `fontSize`/`fontWeight`/`lineHeight` declarations with values from the `typography` object in `lib/theme.ts`. Key changes:

- Drop all `fontWeight: '800'` and `fontWeight: '900'` occurrences (there are ~30 of them across the 3 screens). Replace with `'600'` for interactive labels and `'700'` for titles only. `'400'` for body text.
- Title font sizes: 31-32 -> 34 (Display scale)
- Section titles: 16 -> 17 (Subheading scale)
- Body text: already at 15 (correct)
- Eyebrow: 12 -> 11, add `letterSpacing: 0.8`
- Button text: 13-14, weight 600

This can be done by replacing individual style properties with spread syntax: `...typography.heading` inside the StyleSheet entries where appropriate. Or simply use the numeric values from the typography scale -- spreading full objects works best for titles and body text.

**Step 2.2 -- Border radius replacement**

Replace all `borderRadius: 8` with the appropriate token from `radius`:
- Message bubbles -> `radius.lg` (20)
- Cards, panels, option buttons -> `radius.md` (14)
- Small buttons, inputs -> `radius.sm` (8)
- Tool call pills, inline badges -> `radius.xs` (4)
- Status dots, segmented control, avatars -> `radius.pill` (999)

In `index.tsx`, the message bubble styles (line 1278) change from `borderRadius: 8` to `borderRadius: 20`. The composer (line 1537) changes to `borderRadius: 20`. Tool call text (line 1372) changes to `borderRadius: 4`. In `settings.tsx`, option buttons (line 459) change to `borderRadius: 14`.

**Step 2.3 -- Shadow elevation**

Replace `borderWidth: 1` + `borderColor` patterns on elevated surfaces with shadow tokens from `lib/theme.ts`.

Targets:
- Cards in settings and memories: remove border, add shadow level 1
- Composer bar: remove border, add shadow level 2
- Status panel: remove border, add shadow level 1
- Modals/overlays: shadow level 3

Keep borders only on flat/inset surfaces (dividers, inline items).

**Files modified**: `app/index.tsx`, `app/settings.tsx`, `app/memories.tsx` (StyleSheet sections only)

---

### Phase 3: Emoji Button Overhaul and Message Bubble Redesign

**Goal**: Replace text buttons with emoji, reshape buttons, and modernise message bubbles. This is where the personality shift happens.

**Step 3.1 -- Header emoji buttons (index.tsx)**

Replace the 3 text buttons in the chat header (lines 886-915) with emoji-only ghost circles:
- "New" -> `✨` with `accessibilityLabel="New chat"`
- "Brain" -> `🧠` with `accessibilityLabel="Memories"`
- "Settings" -> `⚙️` with `accessibilityLabel="Settings"`

Style: 36x36 circle, `backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'`, `borderRadius: 18`, no border, centered emoji at 18-20pt.

**Step 3.2 -- Composer button replacement (index.tsx)**

Replace the 3 attachment text buttons (lines 1010-1049) with emoji-only buttons:
- "Photo" -> `🖼️`
- "File" -> `📎`
- "Mic" / "End" / "Stop" / "Cancel" -> `🎙️` / `⏹️` / `⏹️` / `✖️`

Replace "Send" text button (lines 1063-1072) with a circular teal button containing `⬆️`:
- 44px circle, `backgroundColor: colors.accent.teal`, `borderRadius: 22`
- When generating: morph to coral `⏹️` circle

Replace "Stop" cancel button (lines 1052-1058) with coral circle containing `⏹️`:
- 44px circle, `backgroundColor: colors.accent.coral` (`#F2785C`), `borderRadius: 22`

**Step 3.3 -- Message bubble redesign (index.tsx)**

Modify `MessageBubble` component (starts at line 542):
1. Remove the role label `<Text>` entirely (lines 579-581). Drop `getRoleLabel`, `messageRole`, `userMessageRole` styles.
2. Add asymmetric border radius to user bubbles: `borderBottomRightRadius: 6` (tail). Assistant bubbles: `borderBottomLeftRadius: 6`.
3. User bubble bg -> `#12B89E`, text -> `#FFFFFF`
4. Assistant bubble bg -> `#F3EFEC`, text -> `#1A1A1A`, border -> `#E2DCD7`
5. Max width -> 82% (currently 86%)
6. Padding -> `paddingHorizontal: 14, paddingVertical: 10`
7. Tool call pills: change to xs radius (4), tinted bg (`#E6F9F5`), no border
8. Speech button: replace "Play"/"Stop" text with `🔊`/`⏹️` emoji
9. Thinking disclosure: replace "Show"/"Hide" text with `▶`/`▼`
10. Provider badge per message -> hide (shown in status pill instead). Remove `<ProviderBadge>` from bubble.
11. Route detail -> simplify to just timestamp or "Cloud" label

**Step 3.4 -- Settings and memories emoji labels**

In `settings.tsx`:
- "Done" -> `✓ Done`
- "Load model" -> `📦 Load model`
- "Reload model" -> `🔄 Reload`
- "Working..." -> `⏳ Working...`

- "Manual" -> `🔧 Manual`
- "Smart" -> `🤖 Smart`
- Section headers: "Local Model" -> "📦 AI Model", "Runtime Diagnostics" -> "🔍 Runtime Diagnostics", "Memory" -> "🧠 Memory", "Provider Mode" -> "🔀 Provider", "Conversation" -> "💬 Conversation"

In `memories.tsx`:

- "Refresh" -> `🔄 Refresh`
- "Delete" -> `🗑️ Delete`
- "Show details" -> `▶ Show details` / "Hide details" -> `▼ Hide details`

**Step 3.5 -- Empty state redesign (index.tsx)**

Replace `EmptyState` component (lines 393-399):
- Add 64px "J" monogram in teal circle (View with `backgroundColor: colors.accent.teal`, `borderRadius: 32`, centered `<Text>J</Text>`)
- "Hey, I'm Jeff 💬" in Heading weight
- Subtitle in Body weight
- Two suggestion chip `<Pressable>` pills below

**Files modified**: `app/index.tsx`, `app/settings.tsx`, `app/memories.tsx`

---

### Phase 4: Layout Restructuring

**Goal**: The structural layout changes that require more careful surgery. Each sub-step is independently shippable.

**Step 4.1 -- Extract `components/GlassSurface.tsx` from index.tsx**

Move the `GlassSurface` component (lines 402-429) and its associated styles into its own file. Update the light-mode `colorScheme` and fallback colours. Import in `index.tsx` and any other file that needs it. This cleans up index.tsx and establishes the extraction pattern.

**Step 4.2 -- Extract and build `components/StatusPill.tsx`**

This replaces the entire `<GlassSurface effect="clear" style={styles.statusPanel}>` block in index.tsx (lines 918-959). The new component:
- Default state: 28pt tall pill with coloured dot + label ("Gemma 4 E4B ready")
- Dot colour: green for `ready`, amber for `downloading`/`checking`/`verifying`, red for `error`
- Tap handler: currently a no-op placeholder (bottom sheet in Phase 5 or later)
- When downloading: thin progress bar behind the pill text
- When generating: dot pulses (simple `opacity` animation with `withRepeat(withTiming)`)

Props: `modelStatus`, `modelDetail`, `generationStatus`, `generationActive`, `lastDecision`, `modelSize`, `modelError`, `downloadBytes`, `onRetry`, `onUseSmallerModel`

This nets ~80pt of vertical space savings in the default view.

**Step 4.3 -- Extract `components/Composer.tsx` from index.tsx**

Move the entire `composerWrap` block (lines 976-1076 in the JSX) and its associated styles/handlers. This is the largest extraction and reduces index.tsx by ~100 lines of JSX + ~200 lines of styles.

The composer component receives via props: `draft`, `setDraft`, `onSend`, `onCancel`, `onPickImage`, `onPickFile`, `onMic`, `canSend`, `generationActive`, `voiceBusy`, `voiceCanPress`, `voiceStatus`, `stagedAttachments`, `onRemoveStagedAttachment`, `onClearStaged`, `actionError`.

In this step, the "+" fan-out is NOT yet implemented -- just the extraction. The 3 emoji attachment buttons remain inline.

**Step 4.4 -- Extract `components/MessageBubble.tsx` from index.tsx**

Move the `MessageBubble` component (lines 542-646) and all its sub-components (`ThinkingDisclosure`, helper functions) into its own file. It will import the store selectors it needs directly.

**Step 4.5 -- Extract `components/EmptyState.tsx`**

Move the empty state (already redesigned in Phase 3) into its own file.

**Step 4.6 -- Extract `components/VoiceOverlay.tsx`**

Move the voice tray JSX block and its styles. Currently this is relatively small (lines 978-989). The file is a scaffold for the fuller voice strip/overlay coming in Phase 6.

**Step 4.7 -- Settings: iOS grouped card style**

Restructure `settings.tsx`:
- Change root background to `#F2F2F7`
- Wrap each `<Section>` in a white card container with `borderRadius: 14`, shadow level 1
- Section headers become uppercase eyebrow text outside/above the card
- Rows inside cards separated by `#E2DCD7` hairlines inset 16px from left
- Remove `borderTopWidth: 1` from section style (currently the section separator)
- Gate "Runtime Diagnostics" section behind `devMode` boolean (currently always visible):
  ```tsx
  {devMode ? <Section title="🔍 Developer">...</Section> : null}
  ```
- Drop the eyebrow + subtitle from header. Just "Settings" title + "✓ Done" button.

**Step 4.8 -- Memories: tap-to-expand cards**

Restructure `memories.tsx` `MemoryNoteCard`:
- Remove always-visible "Delete" button from card header
- Remove `memoryPath` text from default view (only show in expanded detail when `devMode` is true)
- Make the entire card a `<Pressable>` that calls `onToggle`
- Remove the separate "Show details" / "Hide details" button
- Add type pill next to name (capsule with `#EDE8E4` bg)
- Tags: render as small tinted pills instead of comma-separated text
- Bottom row: tags left, relative date right ("2 days ago" using `Date.now() - new Date(note.modified).getTime()`)

**Step 4.9 -- Memories: search bar**

Add above the card list:
- `<TextInput>` with `#EDE8E4` background, `borderRadius: radius.sm`, placeholder "Search memories"
- Local state `searchQuery`
- Filter `memoryNotes` with `useMemo`: match against `note.name`, `note.preview`, `note.description`, `note.tags.join(' ')`
- Optional: horizontal `<ScrollView>` of tag filter pills below the search bar (collect unique tags from all notes)

**After Phase 4**, `index.tsx` shrinks from ~1680 lines to roughly ~500-600 lines (the main `Chat` component, import block, handler functions, and a much smaller StyleSheet). The heavy rendering logic lives in dedicated component files.

**Files created**: `components/GlassSurface.tsx`, `components/StatusPill.tsx`, `components/Composer.tsx`, `components/MessageBubble.tsx`, `components/EmptyState.tsx`, `components/VoiceOverlay.tsx`
**Files modified**: `app/index.tsx`, `app/settings.tsx`, `app/memories.tsx`

---

### Phase 5: Animations (Tier 1 -- Must-Have)

**Goal**: Add the animation layer that makes the app feel alive. These use `react-native-reanimated` which is already installed.

**Step 5.1 -- Message appear animations**

In `components/MessageBubble.tsx`, wrap the outer `<View>` with `<Animated.View>` and add:
- User messages: `entering={SlideInRight.duration(280)}`
- Assistant messages: `entering={FadeIn.duration(220).delay(60)}`

Import from `react-native-reanimated`: `Animated`, `FadeIn`, `SlideInRight`.

**Step 5.2 -- Send button press bounce**

In `components/Composer.tsx`, replace the send `<Pressable>` with an `<Animated.View>` wrapper. On press:
```ts
const sendScale = useSharedValue(1)
const sendAnimatedStyle = useAnimatedStyle(() => ({ transform: [{ scale: sendScale.value }] }))
// On press:
sendScale.value = withSequence(withTiming(0.92, { duration: 80 }), withTiming(1, { duration: 140 }))
```

Call `hapticSend()` from `lib/haptics.ts` in the send handler.

**Step 5.3 -- Thinking expand/collapse animation**

In the `ThinkingDisclosure` component (now in `MessageBubble.tsx`), wrap the expanded text in `<Animated.View entering={FadeIn.duration(180)} exiting={FadeOut.duration(120)}>`. Apply `Layout.duration(250)` to the parent panel.

**Step 5.4 -- Status pill generating dot pulse**

In `components/StatusPill.tsx`, the coloured dot gets a pulse animation when `generationActive`:
```ts
const dotOpacity = useSharedValue(1)
useEffect(() => {
  if (generationActive) {
    dotOpacity.value = withRepeat(withTiming(0.3, { duration: 600 }), -1, true)
  } else {
    dotOpacity.value = withTiming(1, { duration: 200 })
  }
}, [generationActive])
```

**Step 5.5 -- Staged attachment appear/remove**

In the staged attachment tray, wrap each `StagedAttachmentPreview` in `<Animated.View entering={FadeIn.duration(200).springify()} exiting={FadeOut.duration(150)}>`. Add `Layout` transition for reflow. Call `hapticAttachment()` on add/remove.

**Step 5.6 -- Voice state transition**

In `components/VoiceOverlay.tsx`, wrap the voice tray in `<Animated.View entering={FadeIn.duration(200)} exiting={FadeOut.duration(160)}>`. Call `hapticRecord()` when recording starts.

**Files modified**: `components/MessageBubble.tsx`, `components/Composer.tsx`, `components/StatusPill.tsx`, `components/VoiceOverlay.tsx`, `components/EmptyState.tsx` (staggered entrance), plus `lib/haptics.ts` calls wired in

---

### Phase 6: Animations (Tier 2) and Gestures

**Goal**: Polish animations and add gesture interactions.

**Step 6.1 -- Memory card expand animation**

In `memories.tsx`, wrap expanded detail in `<Animated.View entering={FadeIn.duration(200)}>`. Apply `Layout.duration(280)` to the card container. Call `hapticSelection()` on expand.

**Step 6.2 -- Memory swipe-to-delete**

Replace the card `<View>` with `<Swipeable>` from `react-native-gesture-handler`:
- Right action pane: coral "Forget" button
- On swipe complete: show confirmation Alert with "Keep" / "Forget"
- On delete confirm: `FadeOut(250)` + scale to 0.95
- Call `hapticDelete()` on confirm

This replaces the always-visible "Delete" button removed in Phase 4.8.

**Step 6.3 -- Memory card entrance stagger**

On `FlatList` or map render, add `entering={FadeInDown.delay(index * 60).duration(300)}` capped at `Math.min(index, 8)`.

**Step 6.4 -- Option selection animation (settings)**

In `OptionButton` component, animate the border/background colour change with `withTiming(200)` interpolation using `useAnimatedStyle`. Call `hapticSelection()`.

**Step 6.5 -- Progress bar animation (settings)**

Replace the text-only download progress with a visual bar:
- Track: 4px height, `borderRadius: 2`, `#EDE8E4` bg
- Fill: animated width via `useSharedValue` + `withTiming(400, { easing: Easing.out(Easing.quad) })`
- Label below in caption style

**Step 6.6 -- Composer "+" fan-out (Tier 3, optional)**

Replace the 3 inline attachment buttons with a single "+" circle. Tap triggers `withSpring` animations on `translateX` for each icon, staggered by 30ms. This is the most complex animation and can be deferred.

**Files modified**: `app/memories.tsx`, `app/settings.tsx`, `components/Composer.tsx`, `components/StatusPill.tsx`

---

### Phase 7: Final Polish and Audit

**Step 7.1 -- Typography audit**

Grep across all files for any remaining `fontWeight: '800'` or `fontWeight: '900'` and replace per the type scale.

**Step 7.2 -- Spacing audit**

Verify all padding/margin values align to the 4px grid (multiples of 4). Replace 13/11/18 with nearest grid values (12/12/20). Change `paddingHorizontal: 18` to `20` across all screens.

**Step 7.3 -- Accessibility pass**

Ensure every emoji button has `accessibilityLabel`. Add `accessibilityRole="button"` where missing. Verify 4.5:1 contrast ratios on new colour pairs (the plan's colour choices already satisfy this, but verify on-device).

**Step 7.4 -- Clean up shared utilities**

The three screens currently duplicate `formatBytes`, `formatDownload`, `friendlyModelError`, `ACTIVE_GENERATION_STATUSES`, `BUSY_MODEL_STATUSES`. Move these to a shared location (either `lib/format.ts` or alongside the store). This reduces future maintenance burden.

**Step 7.5 -- Device testing**

Test on real iPhone for: colour rendering, text readability, animation performance, haptic feedback, gesture handling.

---

### Risk Areas and Mitigations

1. **index.tsx is 1680 lines**: The extraction in Phase 4 is the riskiest step. Mitigate by extracting one component at a time and running the app between each extraction. Start with `GlassSurface` (smallest, no state) to prove the pattern, then `EmptyState`, then `MessageBubble`, then `Composer`.

2. **GlassSurface light mode**: The `@callstack/liquid-glass` component uses `colorScheme="dark"` currently. Switching to `"light"` may produce unexpected visual results. Test early in Phase 1. If it looks wrong, fall back to the non-glass `<View>` path with the new light colours.

3. **Reanimated layout animations on FlatList**: `Layout` animations on items inside `FlatList` can cause performance issues. The message list is a `FlatList`. Use `entering`/`exiting` props only (not `layout` prop) on list items. Reserve `Layout` animations for non-list contexts (settings cards, memory cards rendered in a `ScrollView`).

4. **expo-haptics native rebuild**: Adding this dependency requires a native rebuild. If you are developing in Expo Go, this will not work. Since the project already uses `expo-dev-client`, this should be fine, but the `lib/haptics.ts` wrapper's try-catch ensures graceful degradation.

5. **Memory search**: Filtering client-side is fine for small lists. If `memoryNotes` grows to hundreds, consider debouncing the search input.

---

### Critical Files for Implementation
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/lib/theme.ts` (new file -- the design token foundation everything imports)
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/app/index.tsx` (largest file, most changes -- colour swap, component extraction, bubble redesign)
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/app/settings.tsx` (iOS grouped card restyling, dev mode gating)
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/app/memories.tsx` (card redesign, swipe-to-delete, search bar)
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/app/_layout.tsx` (StatusBar and root background -- small but blocks everything else)

content.text:
I now have a thorough understanding of every file, every style, every component, and every piece of state. Here is the complete implementation plan.

---

## Implementation Plan: Jeff Phone UI/UX Redesign

### Structural Overview

The codebase is compact: 4 screen files, a `lib/` directory with 2 files, a `store/` with 6 slices, and `services/` for business logic. There is no `components/` directory yet. The app uses plain `StyleSheet.create` everywhere (no NativeWind className usage in components despite having it configured). All three screens duplicate constants like `BUSY_MODEL_STATUSES`, helper functions like `formatBytes`/`formatDownload`/`friendlyModelError`, and sub-components like `ActionButton`. This duplication is a natural extraction target during the redesign.

---

### Phase 0: Foundation Layer (no visual change yet)

**Goal**: Create the shared infrastructure that all subsequent phases reference. The app looks identical after this phase.

**Step 0.1 -- Create `lib/theme.ts`**

Create a new file at `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/lib/theme.ts` exporting:
- `colors` object with all background, text, accent, bubble, button colour tokens from the plan (section 2). Use nested namespace objects: `colors.bg.root`, `colors.bg.card`, `colors.text.primary`, `colors.accent.teal`, `colors.bubble.user.bg`, etc.
- `radius` object: `{ xs: 4, sm: 8, md: 14, lg: 20, pill: 999 }`
- `shadows` object with 4 levels (0-3), each containing the `shadowColor`, `shadowOffset`, `shadowOpacity`, `shadowRadius`, and `elevation` (for Android)
- `spacing` helper function: `spacing(n: number) => n * 4`
- `typography` object with named presets: `display`, `heading`, `subheading`, `body`, `bodyBold`, `caption`, `eyebrow`, `micro` -- each as a `TextStyle` object containing `fontSize`, `fontWeight`, `lineHeight`, `letterSpacing`
- `buttonStyles` helper factory that takes variant name and returns `{ container: ViewStyle, text: TextStyle }`

This file must be pure constants with zero runtime dependencies (no React, no RN components). It is the single source of truth for the design system.

**Step 0.2 -- Create `lib/haptics.ts`**

Create a thin wrapper module at `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/lib/haptics.ts`. This module should:
- Try to import `expo-haptics` dynamically
- Export named functions: `hapticSend()`, `hapticRecord()`, `hapticTranscribed()`, `hapticAttachment()`, `hapticSelection()`, `hapticDelete()`, `hapticError()`, `hapticButton()`
- Each wraps the appropriate `Haptics.impactAsync`/`notificationAsync`/`selectionAsync` call in a try-catch that silently no-ops if the module is not installed or fails
- This means the new dependency `expo-haptics` can be installed at any point and haptics will "turn on" -- no blocking dependency

**Step 0.3 -- Install `expo-haptics`**

Run: `npx expo install expo-haptics`

This adds the dependency to `package.json`. Requires a native rebuild (`expo prebuild` + pod install), but the haptics wrapper from step 0.2 means code compiles either way.

**Step 0.4 -- Create `components/` directory structure**

Create the following empty component files (scaffolded with basic exports that just re-export current inline behaviour):
- `/Users/alexjay/code/jeffs-brain/phone/components/StatusPill.tsx` -- will replace the full `<GlassSurface>` status panel

### Phase 2: Typography and Border Radius

**Goal**: Apply the new type scale and radius tokens. This is the second most visually impactful change after the colour flip.
